message:
Allow build without running sync:changelog

Add stub files for changelog content and sidebar configuration so that
`pnpm build` works without first running `pnpm sync:changelog`. The stubs
are overwritten when sync runs.

Also allow tree-sitter build scripts for TQL syntax highlighting.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,10 +7,10 @@
 dist/
 node_modules/
 
-# Changelog sync
+# Changelog sync (generated content, stubs are tracked)
 .news/
-src/content/docs/changelog/
-src/sidebar-changelog.generated.ts
+src/content/docs/changelog/*
+!src/content/docs/changelog/index.mdx
 
 # Logs
 dev.log

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+---
+title: Changelog
+---
+
+The changelog is populated during CI builds. Run `pnpm sync:changelog` locally
+to fetch release notes from the [tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news)
+repository.
